texto: It is in providing outward display for things and pathways as they exist within the horizons of landscape that places enable memories to become inwardly inscribed and possessed: made one with the memorial self. The visibility without becomes part of the invisibility within.
explicacao: Citação de Edward S. Casey sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It is in providing outward display for things and pathways as they exist within the horizons of l…” articula reflexao, memory, place em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como place.
